heading: Termination of assistance
label: 16165 Termination of assistance
notes: Amendments2008—Subsec. (a)(2). , amended par. (2) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (2) read as follows: “when the member separates from the Ready Reserve, as provided for under section 16164(a)(1) or section 16164(a)(2), as applicable, of this title.”Pub. L. 110–181, § 530(a)(2)Subsec. (b). , struck out “of not more than 90 days” after “in the Selected Reserve”.Pub. L. 110–181, § 530(b)2006— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserted heading, substituted “Except as provided in subsection (b), educational assistance” for “Educational assistance”, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 109–163

children.text: if the member is receiving financial assistance under as a member of the Senior Reserve Officers’ Training Corps program; orsection 2107 of this title
when the member separates from the Ready Reserve as provided in , or upon completion of the period provided for in , as applicable.section 16164(a)(1) of this titlesection 16164(a)(2) of this title

children.heading: .—Exception
children.label: b .—Exception
children.text: Under regulations prescribed by the Secretary of Defense, educational assistance may be provided under this chapter to a member of the Selected Reserve of the Ready Reserve who incurs a break in service in the Selected Reserve if the member continues to serve in the Ready Reserve during and after such break in service.
